NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

Purpose: Recipient may use Confidential Information only for evaluating a business relationship.

Confidential Information means all non-public business and technical information disclosed by Discloser.

Exclusions: information already known, independently developed, publicly available, or required by law.

Term: this agreement remains in force for 5 years. Confidentiality obligations survive indefinitely for health data.

Return or Destruction: Recipient shall return or destroy information within 7 days and certify destruction.

Governing Law: courts of the UAE shall have exclusive jurisdiction.
